starting_village.name: Starting Village
starting_village.description: A peaceful village where new adventurers begin their journey. The innkeeper serves warm meals and merchants offer basic equipment.

npcs.name: Elder Mira
dialogues: Safe travels, adventurer. The roads grow darker each passing day.
I've seen many young souls set out for glory. Few return unchanged.
The forest to the north whispers at night. Take heed.
You know, this village has a name. Origia. It always has. I don't expect you'll use it, but there it is.

npcs.name: Blacksmith Torren
dialogues: Need a blade forged? Come back when you've enough coin, friend.
Iron don't lie. A good sword outlasts its wielder every time.
I've been getting requests for stronger steel lately. Something dangerous is stirring.

your_land.name: Your Land
your_land.description: A personal plot of land where you can build and customize your home. The possibilities are endless.

forest_path.name: Dark Forest
forest_path.description: A dense forest filled with twisted trees and mysterious shadows. Strange sounds echo through the undergrowth.

npcs.name: Lost Ranger
dialogues: These woods... they've changed. Things move between the trees that shouldn't.
Watch your step. The goblins have been emboldened by something deeper in the forest.
I've been tracking a large orc warband. If you see them, run.

deep_woods.name: Deep Woods
deep_woods.description: The heart of the forest where ancient magic still lingers. Dangerous creatures prowl these shadows.

npcs.name: Forest Witch Sylva
dialogues: The trees speak to me, child. And today they speak of you.
Something ancient woke in these woods three moons ago. A hunger.
Bring me the heart of the Orc Chieftain and I shall grant you a gift.

ancient_ruins.name: Ancient Ruins
ancient_ruins.description: Remnants of a forgotten civilization. These crumbling structures hold both treasure and peril.

npcs.name: Archaeologist Voss
dialogues: Incredible! These ruins predate the kingdom by at least 800 years.
I found a sealed chamber but dare not open it alone. Would you help?
The inscriptions speak of a power locked beneath — the Shadow Seal.

underground_tombs.name: Underground Tombs
underground_tombs.description: Hidden beneath the ruins, ancient burial chambers guarded by undead warriors.

crystal_caves.name: Crystal Caves
crystal_caves.description: Glowing crystals illuminate these caverns, but dangerous elementals guard their secrets.

npcs.name: Miner Petra
dialogues: The crystals sing down here, if you listen close enough.
Lost three of my crew to the Crystal Guardian last week. We need backup.
There's a vein of void crystal deeper in. Worth a fortune — if you survive reaching it.

tavern.name: The Tavern
tavern.description: A warm tavern in the heart of the town. Adventurers meet here to swap stories and hire companions.

npcs.name: Old Bard Fenwick
dialogues: Sit down, traveler! Let me sing you a tale of the Crystal Caves... and its many victims.
Gold flows like ale in this town — but only for those brave enough to earn it.
They say a ghost haunts the ancient ruins at midnight. A spirit seeking vengeance.

npcs.name: Cloaked Stranger
dialogues: You didn't see me here. And I certainly didn't see you.
There are things buried beneath these lands that should stay buried.
If you're looking for work outside the law... seek the shadow market.

forgotten_oasis.name: Forgotten Oasis
forgotten_oasis.description: A hidden sanctuary in the desert, with crystal clear water and lush palm trees. Travelers rest here — if they survive the journey.

taiga_outskirts.name: Taiga Outskirts
taiga_outskirts.description: The frigid outer edge of the Vaelthari taiga. Frost-covered pines stretch endlessly into the grey horizon. Vaelthari wolves howl in the distance and the ground crunches underfoot with permafrost. The air smells of pine resin and ice.

npcs.name: Old Trapper Voronov
dialogues: Forty winters I've walked this taiga. It gets colder every year — and meaner.
Stay on the marked paths. Off-trail, the wolves travel in packs of twelve.
I've seen tracks in the deep snow. Prints big as wagon wheels. Something lives out there.

npcs.name: Merchant Anya
dialogues: Good furs and sharp steel — that's what keeps you alive out here.
The shamans in the deep taiga don't take kindly to outsiders. Tread carefully.
Heard a rumour of a great beast in the permafrost caverns. The Snowbinable, they call it.
